hypothesis: Already-selected trend_long Technology signals with no other sizing modifier may deserve a dedicated 1.5x risk budget instead of the generic risk_on_unmodified 1.25x lift because the accepted-stack audit showed two isolated unmodified Technology trend winners.
change_summary: Temporarily added a shared portfolio_engine sizing branch for trend_long + Technology signals when no other sizing rule fired. The candidate replaced the generic 1.25x risk_on_unmodified lift with a 1.5x dedicated Technology trend lift. It was reverted after fixed three-window testing because the positive effect was too small to pass Gate 4.
component: quant/constants.py, quant/portfolio_engine.py (temporary patch reverted after rejection)

parameters.single_causal_variable: trend_long + Technology + no other sizing modifier risk multiplier
parameters.stacking_policy: do not stack with risk_on_unmodified or any existing sizing multiplier

market_regime_summary.late_strong: slow-melt bull / accepted-stack dominant tape with one affected Technology trend winner
market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull where no realized trade changed
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with one affected Technology trend winner

delta_metrics.gate4_basis: Rejected: aggregate EV delta +0.0819 is below +0.10, aggregate PnL +1.82% is below +5%, no single-window Sharpe improvement reached +0.1, and trade count/win rate were unchanged.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft-ranking remains sample-limited, so this tested deterministic shared sizing alpha instead of LLM behavior.

history_guardrails.not_repeating_technology_breakout: This tested trend_long Technology only, not the rejected breakout_long Technology branch.
history_guardrails.not_repeating_risk_on_score_threshold: This did not narrow risk_on eligibility; it tested a narrow sector/strategy sizing pocket.

rejection_reason: The affected Technology trend pocket is directionally positive but too sparse and too small to justify adding a new production sizing branch.
next_retry_requires: Do not retry nearby trend_long Technology unmodified multipliers without a broader sample or orthogonal discriminator.
A valid retry needs evidence that the pocket affects more than isolated late/old winners while preserving mid_weak behavior.
If promoted later, keep the rule in shared portfolio_engine sizing and add parity coverage.
